name: Beiersdorf AG
lede: Nivea runs two centers in Mumbai. Mumbai, covering SSC and R&D, built over 21 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Nivea office in India. We map two, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Beiersdorf AG GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports

about.description: Nivea's India footprint covers Mumbai, spanning SSC and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all five decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Nivea operates 2 active centers in India.
